title: please do not escape — AI agent sandboxes
excerpt: A structured, evidence-carrying dataset of sandboxes and adjacent approaches for running AI coding agents with isolation, network control, or credential mediation.
content_html:
Data lives in github.com/pjlsergeant/ai-sandboxes — every claim traces to a primary source; PRs to correct or add entries are welcome.

Built by the same person behind byre — a comfortable, constrained container box for coding agents. If any of the tools on this page feel like overkill for your day-to-day, byre might be the right amount of fence.
